data.body:
OVERLAY CATALOG — documentation
- Source: Google dev-docs style guide (CC-BY-4.0) + Microsoft Writing Style Guide (CC-BY-4.0) + Diataxis (doc-type taxonomy) + Vale/proselint(BSD)/markdownlint(MIT) + PEP257/TSDoc + Keep a Changelog; CodeRabbit docstring-coverage model.
- Dimensions (two halves): A) prose/docs quality — Diataxis type-fit, voice/grammar, mechanics/consistency, clarity, inclusive language, structure, examples, accessibility, correctness/freshness; B) code-is-documented — docstring presence/completeness on public symbols, format conformance, public-API doc coverage, README adequacy, changelog entry, comment quality.
- Triggers: *.md/*.rst/docs/, README*/CHANGELOG*, docstring-heavy diffs, net-new exported symbols.
- HIGH-VALUE trigger: public/exported symbol changed WITHOUT doc update (AST detect + no doc file touched).
- Scanner pre-pass: Vale/markdownlint/proselint for mechanics; reserve LLM for semantic (type-fit, freshness, audience-adequacy).
- LICENSE FLAG: watch CC-BY-SA on some Vale packages; ship ATTRIBUTIONS note for CC-BY (Google/MS) sources.
